description: Install the interface-design reference skill and optimize skill detail pages with a restrained, replica-style visual system.

userStories.title: Install interface-design reference skill package
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the interface-design skill installed from the provided URL so that implementation decisions can follow a concrete local reference.
acceptanceCriteria: Install skill from https://skills.sh/dammyjay93/interface-design/interface-design using the project-supported skill workflow
Installed skill is available locally with SKILL.md and referenced assets
Record the resolved local install path in implementation notes
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create replica design contract for skill detail optimization
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want a written mapping between reference patterns and current page selectors so that refactoring stays consistent and reviewable.
acceptanceCriteria: Create docs/plans/2026-03-05-interface-design-replica-contract.md
Document typography, spacing, palette, and interaction rules extracted from the reference skill/page
Include selector-level mapping for PublicSkillDetailPage style modules
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Unify skill detail root palette into neutral token system
userStories.description: As a user, I want the skill detail page to use fewer tones so that the page feels cleaner and easier to scan.
acceptanceCriteria: Define or refine root CSS tokens in PublicSkillDetailPage.styles.base.ts with one accent hue per theme
Replace scattered multi-hue hardcoded colors in root, hero, and shared card surfaces
Keep pen-alignment contracts compatible with baseline checks
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Refactor topbar and hero styles to replica-minimal hierarchy
userStories.description: As a user, I want topbar and hero sections to have restrained contrast and clear hierarchy so that navigation and context feel coherent.
acceptanceCriteria: Refactor PublicSkillDetailPage.styles.topbar.ts and related hero rules in base styles to match neutralized hierarchy
Ensure brand, nav, locale/theme controls, and CTA states use tokenized color rules
Keep focus-visible and reduced-motion/accessibility behavior unchanged
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Refactor left column panels with low-noise visual language
userStories.description: As a user, I want summary, quality, file browser, and code blocks to use consistent neutral tones so that dense content remains readable.
acceptanceCriteria: Refactor PublicSkillDetailPage.styles.left.ts to remove non-essential hue variation
Keep active, hover, and selected states distinguishable through contrast and border treatment
Preserve existing layout geometry and responsive behavior
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Refactor right column interaction panels with neutral accents
userStories.description: As a user, I want install, metadata, actions, comments, and compatibility panels to share one coherent tone system so that actions stand out without color clutter.
acceptanceCriteria: Refactor PublicSkillDetailPage.styles.right.ts to remove multi-hue state colors
Map primary actions to the single accent token and secondary actions to neutral surfaces
Keep disabled, validation, and feedback states legible with accessible contrast
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add regression coverage for replica color and interaction constraints
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want automated checks for the new restrained style system so that future edits do not reintroduce tone sprawl.
acceptanceCriteria: Update existing unit or alignment tests to assert key neutral token and baseline fallback contracts
Ensure e2e coverage still validates critical skill detail and login interactions after style refactor
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Run full verification and publish replica optimization evidence
userStories.description: As a stakeholder, I want explicit verification evidence so that the replica optimization can be accepted with low risk.
acceptanceCriteria: Run frontend verification commands: test:unit, test:e2e, test:visual, build
Include visual mismatch ratio and artifact paths when visual regression runs
Run ./scripts/check_max_lines.sh and report hard violations if any remain
Typecheck passes
